name: Decrease the rate of decay of an Arcane Connection as if the connection were one step higher on the table on page 220. (see desc)

system.baseEffectDescription: If this increases the Duration to Years or greater, the duration of the connection continues to be measured in a period of years. Hermetic magic can not make an Arcane Connection last indefinitely without fixing the connection as described in the Laboratory chapter (page 250). Note that the range is the range to the Arcane Connection, and you must know what you are targeting just like any other spell.
